parameters.formDescription: Enter business details to automatically generate, publish, and hand over a client-editable website on GitHub Pages.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Pass through all data — the image_prompt becomes the design spec for Claude Code
return $input.all();

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 16000, system: 'You are a senior frontend developer. Generate Astro components for a business website. Return ONLY a JSON object where keys are file paths (relative to project root) and values are the complete file contents. No explanation, no markdown, just the JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.claude_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.repo_slug, description: 'Website for ' + $json.business_name + ' — Generated by Website Factory', homepage: 'https://' + $json.github_owner + '.github.io/' + $json.repo_slug, auto_init: false, private: false, has_issues: false, has_wiki: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'CNAME', name: $('Validate Build Output').item.json.custom_domain, content: $('Validate Build Output').item.json.github_owner + '.github.io', proxied: true, ttl: 1 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Add custom domain CNAME', content: Buffer.from($('Validate Build Output').item.json.custom_domain).toString('base64'), branch: 'main' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.client_email }] }], from: { email: 'hello@panditai.org', name: 'Website Factory' }, subject: 'Your website for ' + $json.business_name + ' is live!', content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: '

Your website is ready!

Hi there,

Your website for ' + $json.business_name + ' has been generated and published.

  • Live Site: ' + $json.site_url + '
  • CMS Admin: ' + $json.cms_url + '
  • Repository: ' + $json.repo_url + '

You can edit your website content anytime via the CMS Admin link above.

— Website Factory

' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $env.ADMIN_EMAIL || 'admin@panditai.org' }] }], from: { email: 'hello@panditai.org', name: 'Website Factory' }, subject: '[WF] Pipeline complete: ' + $json.business_name, content: [{ type: 'text/plain', value: 'Project: ' + $json.project_id + '
Business: ' + $json.business_name + '
Site: ' + $json.site_url + '
CMS: ' + $json.cms_url + '
Repo: ' + $json.repo_url + '
Client: ' + $json.client_email + '
Live: ' + $json.is_live + '
Components: ' + $json.components_generated }] }) }}

parameters.content:
# Website Factory Pipeline

## Flow
1. **Form Intake** — Business details
2. **Validate** — Normalize, generate slug
3. **Validation Gate** — Check required fields
4. **Save Project** — File-based JSON store (projects.json)
5. **Google Places** — Enrich with address, hours, reviews, photos
6. **Claude API** — Generate website content (JSON)
7. **Design Spec** — Build visual brief from content + style
8. **Claude API** — Generate Astro site from design spec + content
9. **GitHub** — Create repo, push code, enable Pages
10. **Cloudflare DNS** — Optional custom domain CNAME
11. **Verify** — Wait for build, check site is live
12. **Finalize** — Update store, return summary
13. **Notify** — Email client + admin summary

## Error Handling
- Error trigger catches failures at any stage
- Updates projects.json with error status + failed stage

## Key URLs
- Form: /form/website-factory
- Projects: /home/node/.n8n/website-factory/projects.json

## Required Env Vars
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (or OPENCLAW_API_KEY)
- GITHUB_TOKEN
- GITHUB_OWNER

## Optional Env Vars
- GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY (falls back to mock data if unset)
- SENDGRID_API_KEY (email notifications)
- CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID + CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN (custom domains)
